# kDNSServiceFlagsInsecure | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ dnssd ](/documentation/dnssd)

-  kDNSServiceFlagsInsecure 

Global Variable# kDNSServiceFlagsInsecure

iOS 10.0+iPadOS 10.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.12+tvOS 10.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 3.0+

```
var kDNSServiceFlagsInsecure: UInt32 { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceFlagsInsecure#Discussion)

A chain of trust cannot be built starting from a known trust anchor to the response.
